step_rationale: Early AMI injury marker; downregulated in STEMI; cardioprotection target.
mechanism: YWHAZ (14-3-3-zeta) is a cardioprotective adaptor protein whose downregulation in acute MI reflects early cardiomyocyte injury and ischemic stress.

references.title: Plasma Exosomal Proteomics Identifies Differentially Expressed Proteins as Biomarkers for Acute Myocardial Infarction.
Discovery of 14-3-3 zeta as a potential biomarker for cardiac hypertrophy.
Serum proteomic analysis reveals the cardioprotective effects of Shexiang Baoxin Pill and Suxiao Jiuxin Pill in a rat model of acute myocardial infarction.
Proteomic analysis revealed the pharmacological mechanism of Xueshuantong injection in preventing early acute myocardial infarction injury.
